title: Group by alias with distinct count doesn't work
poc: SELECT k as c,count(distinct b) from a group by c;
key_bug_features: Group by alias with distinct count query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE b (id INT, value VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT id AS item_id, COUNT(DISTINCT value) FROM b GROUP BY item_id;
SELECT item_id, COUNT(DISTINCT value) FROM (SELECT id AS item_id, value FROM b WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS subquery GROUP BY item_id;
